data.body: ALL 10 GREEN once (LLM+MAX+Ver+MAX) but origin/main advanced (b5b8ccb37 -> 5eff240e8) so FFO submit required a rebase. Rebased onto 5eff240e8, re-pushed (SUCCESS), CI re-running. Auto-recheck poll handling the recurring flaky fresh-store git-race BLOCKs (could-not-parse-HEAD / bad-tree / lock — all unrelated to the diffs, LLM+MAX throughout, local full suite green). Will submit the stack top (617, submits the chain) the instant all 10 are green again, before origin/main moves. NOTE: FFO rebases change commit shas -> leaf completion attestations may read stale on the eventual epic close (certifiable:false / unsigned epic) — acceptable terminal state per CLAUDE.md; the leaves themselves were closed+signed at their close-time.
